data.title: GuideWell Source CEO Harvey Dikter to retire in 2026 after leading the administrative services company.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, on January 26, 2026, GuideWell Source, a prominent administrative services company offering comprehensive administrative business solutions for health programs, disclosed that their CEO, Harvey Dikter, will be retiring later this year. Harvey Dikter has been a key figure in the company's leadership for several years.

data.title: La Caisse plans to sell 11% stake in Cogeco Communications at $67.45 per share.
data.description: Today, in Montreal, it was revealed that La Caisse, previously known as CDPQ, plans to sell approximately 11% of the subordinate shares of Cogeco Communications (TSX: CCA). The block of shares is set to be sold at a price of $67.45 per share. This move signals a significant divestment of the company's ownership stake.

data.title: Milestone Group acquires 266-unit Legends at Laurel Canyon apartments in Canton, Georgia for undisclosed amount.
data.description: In Canton, Georgia, on January 26, 2026, the Milestone Group revealed their acquisition of Legends at Laurel Canyon. This garden-style apartment complex boasts 266 units and is situated in the thriving North Atlanta suburb. The specific purchase value was not made public.

data.title: 2026 article examines choosing oxygen concentrator, focusing on daily routines, mobility, and delivery needs.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in New York, recent developments in oxygen support technology have revolutionized the selection process for oxygen concentrators. In the year 2026, instead of aiming to find the ultimate model, individuals are now focusing on discovering the optimal solution tailored to their everyday activities, mobility requirements, and oxygen administration.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to Benchmark 2026-V20: $886.9M CMBS with 13 classes, 34 loans, and 59 properties. Top MSAs: NY (28.3%), Boston (9.6%), and Las Vegas (8.5%).
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 13 classes of Benchmark 2026-V20, a CMBS conduit transaction valued at $886.9 million. The collateral for this transaction includes 34 commercial mortgage loans secured by 59 properties spread across 25 MSAs. The three largest MSAs represented are New York (28.3%), Boston (9.6%), and Las Vegas (8.5%). The pool of properties covers various major property types, with five types making up more than 10.0% of the pool.

data.title: Dr. Deborah Bromfield Lee named the Jessie Ball duPont Endowed Chair in Natural Sciences at Florida Southern College. Joined in 2012.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on January 26, 2026, Florida Southern College has announced Dr. Deborah Bromfield Lee as the recipient of the Jessie Ball duPont Endowed Chair in the Natural Sciences. Dr. Bromfield Lee, who has been a faculty member at the college since 2012, has been appointed to this prestigious position.

data.title: Russia blocks WhiteBIT for supporting Ukraine's war effort, branding the crypto exchange 'undesirable'.
data.description: The Russian government has placed WhiteBIT and its parent company on a blacklist due to the crypto exchange's endorsement of Ukraine's military actions. This decision comes as tensions heightened between Russia and Ukraine, with WhiteBIT facing consequences for its involvement. The move signifies a notable crackdown by Russian authorities, with WhiteBIT finding itself targeted amidst rising conflicts. The blacklisting of WhiteBIT and its parent company marks a significant development in the ongoing situation, highlighting the impact of geopolitical tensions on the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: RET fusion-targeted therapies market to grow significantly by 2034 with the approval of selpercatinib and pralsetinib for RET fusion-positive tumors.
data.description: The market for RET fusion-targeted therapy is poised for significant growth, propelled by increasing recognition of the cancer-causing potential of RET gene fusions and positive results from clinical trials. Approval of targeted drugs like selpercatinib and pralsetinib for RET fusion-positive tumors has further fueled this expansion. The market size is expected to see a notable increase in sales, reaching an estimated value of $X billion in the coming years.

data.title: Compa secures $35M in Series B funding to enhance AI-driven enterprise compensation. Led by Jump Capital.
data.description: In Newport Beach, California, Compa, a top AI-driven compensation intelligence provider, revealed securing $35 million in Series B funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Jump Capital and saw the involvement of Crosslink Capital, Storm Ventures, Permanent Capital, HR Tech Investments LLC (an affiliate of Indeed, Inc.), and PagsGroup. Over the years, large companies have traditionally used yearly compensation surveys and spreadsheets to determine pay, handling one of their most significant and closely examined financial aspects.

data.title: Chicago Friday Night Flights craft beer event at 2026 Chicago Auto Show on Feb. 13 from 5-8 pm. Local craft beer sampling.
data.description: Chicago Friday Night Flights is set to return at the Chicago Auto Show on Friday, Feb. 13, 2026, from 5-8 p.m. This popular event will showcase local craft beer, allowing attendees to enjoy a wide variety of samples while exploring the auto show.

data.title: Intercorp Financial Services, Inc. to host Q4 2025 earnings conference call & webcast. Date: Feb...
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Lima, Peru, Intercorp Financial Services Inc. (IFS) revealed plans to conduct its Fourth Quarter 2025 earnings conference call and video webcast presentation. The company, listed as IFS on both the Bolsa de Valores de Lima (BVL) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), scheduled the conference call for Thursday, February [date to be provided]. The call will offer insights into the financial performance of the company during the mentioned quarter.

data.title: Nucor stock drops after missing Q4 earnings estimates. Revenue at $7.69B (vs. $7.87B est.), EPS $1.64 (vs. $1.99 est.).
data.description: Nucor Corp (NYSE: NUE) recently released its Q4 financial results, revealing revenue of $7.69 billion, which fell short of analyst predictions of $7.87 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were reported at $1.64, lower than the estimated $1.99 per share. The company experienced declines in its steel mills segment earnings, ascribed to decreased volumes and margin compression, particularly in the sheet sector. Earnings from the steel products segment also decreased due to lower volumes and increased average costs per ton. Nucor stock is currently showing a notable trend, prompting speculation on the future of NUE shares. For a detailed account of the report, interested parties can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 4DMedical raises over $100M to expand in the US, enhance lung imaging tech. Strong backing for CT:VQ™ product.
data.description: A significant amount of funding has been secured to expand hospital installations for the innovative CT:VQ™ imaging technology. This funding will not only support research and development efforts but also provide assistance to early adopters such as Stanford, Cleveland Clinic, University of Miami, and UC San Diego Health. The funding will enable widespread adoption of the technology by medical facilities and drive further advancements in healthcare. The partnership between Los Angeles and Melbourne, Australia-based company 4DMedical is set to revolutionize the medical industry with its cutting-edge imaging product.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR) to announce Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 4:30pm ET.
data.description: Figure Technology Solutions, a prominent blockchain-based capital marketplace (Nasdaq: FIGR), revealed its intentions to disclose the Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 financial outcomes on Thursday, February 26, 2026, post-market closure. The conference call, scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day, will delve into the company's results, future prospects, and other pertinent topics.

data.title: Roofing Expert John Kolarik advises on roof snow removal in Traverse City to prevent damage.
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan, on January 26, 2026, Roofing Expert John Kolarik from Mariage Roofing emphasizes the significance of removing snow from roofs to prevent damage. A recent HelloNation article addresses this issue, highlighting the critical nature of timely snow removal for homeowners. John Kolarik provides valuable insights on the potential risks associated with snow accumulation on roofs, stressing the need for prompt action. It is essential for homeowners to stay vigilant and clear snow from their roofs promptly to avoid structural damage.

data.title: San Francisco Peninsula starts culinary initiative to celebrate diverse dining landscape with new programming in multi-year plan.
data.description: A multi-year culinary initiative has been launched in San Mateo County, California, specifically on the San Francisco Peninsula. This initiative aims to celebrate the diverse dining landscape of the region through new programming. This endeavor will span across several years and will focus on showcasing the varied culinary offerings in the area.
